title: Hira Deboota
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Hira Deboota''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] physician from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] who worked for the [[Coruscant State Coroner]]. After finishing an autopsy on a dead [[Yaka]], he saw a similarity between the Yaka and [[Gank/Legends|Ganks]]. Deboota then forwarded the information he had learned to [[Senior Anthropologist]] [[Mammon Hoole]] and to proper [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] scientific authorities.

{{Char-stub}}
